---
title: "29 Apr 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-04-29"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Met with our Expert Advisory Board, still processing all the great input.....

Asked for numbers from the Productivity Commission work, but they're too exciting, so they'll get their own blog at some point....

[Asparagus](https://parlinfo.aph.gov.au/parlInfo/search/display/display.w3p;page=0;query=Asparagus%20Decade%3A%221890s%22;rec=0;resCount=Default)...
